name: Integration - Escalation Endpoint Workflow
description: Tests the /api/assistant/escalate endpoint to ensure escalation triggers both notification and audit logging subsystems.
input: POST to /api/assistant/escalate with JSON containing issue_details and user_context.
output: JSON response indicating success and a message that the issue was escalated.
success_criteria: Notification is sent to staff contact
Audit log event is recorded with action 'escalation'
